title: Pickup Handlers Analysis
description: Analysis of tile effect handlers for pickups and item recovery in tactical combat

RecoverableObjectTileEffectHandler.description: Handles pickup of recoverable objects (e.g., dropped weapons, special items) on tactical map tiles. Creates DropRecoverableObjectHandler skill on pickup.

0x10.name: Tile
0x10.description: Reference to the tile this effect is placed on (inherited from TileEffectHandler)

0x18.name: RoundCounter
0x18.description: Tracks the round when effect was created for lifetime calculations

0x28.name: RecoverableObjectTemplate
0x28.description: Template defining the recoverable object properties

0x30.name: AllowAlliesPickup
0x30.description: If true, allied units (not just player-controlled) can pick up the object

0x38.name: RecoverObjective
0x38.description: Optional mission objective tracking this recoverable object

0xB8.name: SkillToGrant
0xB8.description: Skill template to grant the actor upon pickup

0xC0.name: PickupSound
0xC0.description: Sound effect to play when object is picked up

0xC8.name: CanPickupOnFoot
0xC8.description: Whether infantry units (movement type 0) can pickup

0xC9.name: CanPickupInVehicle
0xC9.description: Whether vehicle units (movement type 1) can pickup

pickup_conditions: Actor is player-controlled OR (AllowAllies=true AND not allied with player)
pickup_sequence: 2. Play pickup sound at tile position
7. Add skill to actor's skill container
9. Remove from RecoverObject objective if present

RefillAmmoTileEffectHandler.description: Handles ammo refill pickups on tactical map tiles. Refills ammunition for actors based on percentage or minimum amount.

0x10.name: Tile
0x10.description: Reference to the tile this effect is placed on

0x18.name: RoundCounter
0x18.description: Tracks the round when effect was created

0x30.name: TeamFilter
0x30.description: Team filter for pickup. 0=any team can pickup, otherwise must match actor's team

0xB8.name: PickupSound
0xB8.description: Sound effect to play when ammo is picked up

0xC0.name: RefillPercent
0xC0.description: Percentage of max ammo to refill (0.0-1.0)

0xC4.name: MinAmount
0xC4.description: Minimum number of rounds to add regardless of percentage

0xC8.name: SkillFilter
0xC8.description: Filter for which skills/weapons to refill ammo for

pickup_conditions: TeamFilter == 0 OR actor team matches TeamFilter
Actor can pickup flag (+0x48) is set
pickup_sequence: 2. Call Actor.RefillAmmo with percent, minAmount, and skillFilter
3. Play pickup sound at tile position
4. Show 'Ammo Refilled' text on actor's UnitHUD

AddItemTileEffectHandler.description: Handles item pickup that adds items to player's strategic inventory (OwnedItems). Only works for player-controlled actors.

0x10.name: Tile
0x10.description: Reference to the tile this effect is placed on

0x18.name: RoundCounter
0x18.description: Tracks the round when effect was created

0xB8.name: Count
0xB8.description: Number of items to add (or count-related parameter)

pickup_conditions: Actor is an Actor type (vtable +0x508 check)

EnemiesDropPickupOnDeathHandler.description: Skill event handler that spawns pickup tile effects when enemies are killed. Subscribes to TacticalManager.OnDeath event during mission.

0x18.name: SkillData
0x18.description: Contains data for skill effect including pickup template at +0x58

0x58.name: PickupEffectList
0x58.description: List containing tile effect templates to spawn on enemy death

death_handling: 1. Get entity that owns this skill
2. Verify entity is valid and alive (+0x48)
3. Verify the death event matches this entity
4. Check if killer is an Actor (type check)
5. Skip if killer is summoned (+0xD8 flag)
6. Skip if killer is allied with entity
8. If RefillAmmoTileEffectHandler, set TeamFilter (+0x30) to entity's team (+0x4C)
9. If entity blocks tiles (+0xBC), find free adjacent tile
10. Add tile effect to death location or adjacent free tile

tile_finding.description: Iterates through 8 adjacent tiles (via GetNextTile), returns first tile that exists, is not blocked (+0x1C bit 0), and is empty

DropRecoverableObjectHandler.description: Skill event handler that spawns RecoverableObjectTileEffectHandler when the owning entity dies. Used by skills that drop items on death.

0x20.name: AllowAllies
0x20.description: Whether allied units can pickup the dropped object

0x28.name: RecoverObjective
0x28.description: Mission objective tracking this dropped object

spawn_tile_effect: 4. Register with RecoverObject objective if present
on_death: 2. Attempt to spawn on current tile
4. If still invalid, search 2-tile range (adjacent of adjacent)
5. Log error if no valid tile found

TileEffectHandler.description: Base class for all tile effects

0x10.name: Tile
0x10.description: The tile this effect is attached to

static_data.description: Static class initializer creates array of 5 Vector2 offsets for adjacent tile calculations

events.OnDeath: Event fired when any entity dies, used by EnemiesDropPickupOnDeathHandler
events.OnSkillAdded: Event fired when skill is added to entity

RecoverObject.description: Mission objective type for recovering objects

methods.AddObject: Registers a recoverable object with the objective
methods.RemoveObject: Removes a recoverable object from the objective (on pickup)

methods.HasActor: Check if tile has an actor
methods.GetNextTile: Get adjacent tile by direction index (0-7)

team_ids.1: Enemy team (vehicle movement type in some contexts)
